loan_payment_date.text: วันที่ประมวลผลเรียกเก็บ

date_1.text: วันที่คำนวนดอกเบี้ย

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance
--วันที่คำนวนดอกเบี้ย , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy'))as cal_date --, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy'))as pm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date)as pm_date , (to_date('!date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') - to_date(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date,'DD/MM/YYYY')) as date_cal , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name (sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no
--,pka_com_function.fp_get_intarr_card_atdate ( to_date('!date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) as intsrr_card , nvl(0,0) as intsrr_card ,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_calint (sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, to_date('!date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date ,'PL') as int_cal
from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered
where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = 'PM' --วันที่ประมวลผลเรียกเก็บ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date = to_date('!date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy') /*WHERE*/
order by sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date ASC , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ASC , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ASC
